items.headline: Wall Street Analysts Think Dell Technologies (DELL) Is a Good Investment: Is It?
items.summary: The average brokerage recommendation (ABR) for Dell Technologies (DELL) is equivalent to a Buy. The overly optimistic recommendations of Wall Street analysts make the effectiveness of this highly sought-after metric questionable. So, is it worth buying the stock?

items.headline: Is AMD’s £2 Billion UK AI Bet Altering The Investment Case For Advanced Micro Devices (AMD)?
items.summary: Earlier this month, AMD announced plans to invest up to £2.00 billion in the UK over five years, alongside new AI supercomputing collaborations with Dell Technologies, the University of Cambridge and Oriole Networks that expand national research and AI infrastructure. By anchoring cutting-edge systems like the Zenith and Sunrise AI supercomputers and backing photonic-networked inference research, AMD is embedding its GPUs and CPUs at the core of the UK’s long-term AI and high‑performance...
